title: [CR] router.py: gpsr_forward validation order allows NaN/inf haversine calculation
description:
File: python/src/lichen/routing/router.py:511-518

After analysis: This is NOT a bug. The code correctly catches NaN/inf:
- NaN: -90 <= nan returns False, so full expression is False, not False = True, returns None
- inf: -90 <= inf <= 90 is False (inf > 90), so returns None

The second check for isnan/isinf is actually unreachable given the first check. This is dead code.

Downgrade to P3: Remove the unreachable isnan/isinf check as dead code, or reorder so NaN check comes first with a comment explaining why.
close_reason: Fixed: reordered NaN/inf check before range check to make behavior clearer
